name: Taiba Investment Company
description: Taiba Investment Company invests in, buys, owns, develops, sells, leases, operates, maintains, markets, and manages real estate properties in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It operates through Real Estate, Tourism and Property Management. The Real Estate segment includes the leasing of residential and commercial centers; as well as property-level management, and other services. The Tourism segment includes operation and accommodation of hotels, hotel apartments, serviced suites, and tourist resorts. The Property Management segment includes management and operations of the hotels and other properties. The company also offers buying, selling, leasing, operating, and managing real estate, hotels, hospitals, recreational and other residential, non-residential and tourism facilities. It is also involved in the architectural, civil, mechanical, electrical, agricultural, and industrial contracting; and industrial and mining activities. In addition, the company also provides services that include Ancillary services, which include laundry, business centre services, transportation, and other operational services; and Hajj services, Hajj season as pilgrims receive and consume the benefits of accommodation, transportation, meals, and guidance services; Hospitality services; as well as credit and mortgage services. The company was formerly known as Taiba Holding Co. and changed its name to Taiba Investment Company in May 2019. Taiba Investment Company was founded in 1988 and is based in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
